---
title: "Suspended Circles"
---

This placeholder will connect the suspended-circle paper, finite cell-count formulas, and future S2 interactives.

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="S2-T0002"></div>
<div class="widget-panel" data-widget="sphere_grid_placeholder"></div>

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
<script type="module" src="../../widgets/S2/sphere_grid_placeholder.js"></script>
